controls.value:
query {
get_broadcast(
id: 354
) {
    diary_author
    groups_create
    id
    is_diary
    is_ended
    link_article
    link_img
    posts {
      answers {
        author
        has_big_img
        id
        id_broadcast
        id_parent
        images {
          filepath
          id
          post_id
          source
          thumbs {
            filepath
            height
            type
            width
          }
        }
        link
        post_time
        post_type
        text
      }
      author
      has_big_img
      id
      id_broadcast
      id_parent
      images {
        filepath
        id
        post_id
        source
        thumbs {
          filepath
          height
          type
          width
        }
      }
      link
      post_time
      post_type
      text
    }
    show_date
    show_main_page
    show_time
    time_begin
    time_created
    title
  }
}

query {
list_broadcast(
search: "search",
is_ended: 0,
order: "\"id DESC\"",
limit: 100,
offset: 0
) {
    length
    list {
      diary_author
      groups_create
      id
      is_diary
      is_ended
      link_article
      link_img
      show_date
      show_main_page
      show_time
      time_begin
      time_created
      title
    }
  }
}

query {
list_full_broadcast(
search: "search",
is_ended: 0,
order: "\"id DESC\"",
limit: 100,
offset: 0
) {
    length
    list {
      diary_author
      groups_create
      id
      is_diary
      is_ended
      link_article
      link_img
      posts {
        answers {
          author
          has_big_img
          id
          id_broadcast
          id_parent
          images {
            filepath
            id
            post_id
            source
            thumbs {
              filepath
              height
              type
              width
            }
          }
          link
          post_time
          post_type
          text
        }
        author
        has_big_img
        id
        id_broadcast
        id_parent
        images {
          filepath
          id
          post_id
          source
          thumbs {
            filepath
            height
            type
            width
          }
        }
        link
        post_time
        post_type
        text
      }
      show_date
      show_main_page
      show_time
      time_begin
      time_created
      title
    }
  }
}

mutation {
create_broadcast(
show_time: 0,
link_article: "link article",
groups_create: 0,
is_diary: 0,
title: "title",
time_created: 0,
time_begin: 0,
is_ended: 0,
show_date: 0,
show_main_page: 0,
link_img: "link img",
diary_author: "diary author"
) {
    diary_author
    groups_create
    id
    is_diary
    is_ended
    link_article
    link_img
    posts {
      answers {
        author
        has_big_img
        id
        id_broadcast
        id_parent
        images {
          filepath
          id
          post_id
          source
          thumbs {
            filepath
            height
            type
            width
          }
        }
        link
        post_time
        post_type
        text
      }
      author
      has_big_img
      id
      id_broadcast
      id_parent
      images {
        filepath
        id
        post_id
        source
        thumbs {
          filepath
          height
          type
          width
        }
      }
      link
      post_time
      post_type
      text
    }
    show_date
    show_main_page
    show_time
    time_begin
    time_created
    title
  }
}

mutation {
create_post(
link: "link",
has_big_img: 0,
author: "author",
id_parent: 0,
id_broadcast: 0,
text: "text",
post_time: 0,
post_type: 0
) {
    answers {
      author
      has_big_img
      id
      id_broadcast
      id_parent
      images {
        filepath
        id
        post_id
        source
        thumbs {
          filepath
          height
          type
          width
        }
      }
      link
      post_time
      post_type
      text
    }
    author
    has_big_img
    id
    id_broadcast
    id_parent
    images {
      filepath
      id
      post_id
      source
      thumbs {
        filepath
        height
        type
        width
      }
    }
    link
    post_time
    post_type
    text
  }
}

mutation {
delete_broadcast(
id: 0
) {
    diary_author
    groups_create
    id
    is_diary
    is_ended
    link_article
    link_img
    posts {
      answers {
        author
        has_big_img
        id
        id_broadcast
        id_parent
        images {
          filepath
          id
          post_id
          source
          thumbs {
            filepath
            height
            type
            width
          }
        }
        link
        post_time
        post_type
        text
      }
      author
      has_big_img
      id
      id_broadcast
      id_parent
      images {
        filepath
        id
        post_id
        source
        thumbs {
          filepath
          height
          type
          width
        }
      }
      link
      post_time
      post_type
      text
    }
    show_date
    show_main_page
    show_time
    time_begin
    time_created
    title
  }
}

mutation {
update_broadcast(
id: 0,
time_begin: 0,
show_date: 0,
show_main_page: 0,
link_article: "link article",
link_img: "link img",
diary_author: "diary author",
title: "title",
time_created: 0,
is_ended: 0,
show_time: 0,
groups_create: 0,
is_diary: 0
) {
    diary_author
    groups_create
    id
    is_diary
    is_ended
    link_article
    link_img
    posts {
      answers {
        author
        has_big_img
        id
        id_broadcast
        id_parent
        images {
          filepath
          id
          post_id
          source
          thumbs {
            filepath
            height
            type
            width
          }
        }
        link
        post_time
        post_type
        text
      }
      author
      has_big_img
      id
      id_broadcast
      id_parent
      images {
        filepath
        id
        post_id
        source
        thumbs {
          filepath
          height
          type
          width
        }
      }
      link
      post_time
      post_type
      text
    }
    show_date
    show_main_page
    show_time
    time_begin
    time_created
    title
  }
}

mutation {
update_post(
id: 0,
id_parent: 0,
post_time: 0,
link: "link",
author: "author",
id_broadcast: 0,
text: "text",
post_type: 0,
has_big_img: 0
) {
    answers {
      author
      has_big_img
      id
      id_broadcast
      id_parent
      images {
        filepath
        id
        post_id
        source
        thumbs {
          filepath
          height
          type
          width
        }
      }
      link
      post_time
      post_type
      text
    }
    author
    has_big_img
    id
    id_broadcast
    id_parent
    images {
      filepath
      id
      post_id
      source
      thumbs {
        filepath
        height
        type
        width
      }
    }
    link
    post_time
    post_type
    text
  }
}

types.description:
A Directive provides a way to describe alternate runtime execution and type validation behavior in a GraphQL document. 

In some cases, you need to provide options to alter GraphQL's execution behavior in ways field arguments will not suffice, such as conditionally including or skipping a field. Directives provide this by describing additional information to the executor.

ofType.description: Arguments provided to Fields or Directives and the input fields of an InputObject are represented as Input Values which describe their type and optionally a default value.
ofType.name: __InputValue

type.description: The `String` scalar type represents textual data, represented as UTF-8 character sequences. The String type is most often used by GraphQL to represent free-form human-readable text.
type.name: String

ofType.description: A Directive can be adjacent to many parts of the GraphQL language, a __DirectiveLocation describes one such possible adjacencies.
ofType.name: __DirectiveLocation

ofType.description: The `String` scalar type represents textual data, represented as UTF-8 character sequences. The String type is most often used by GraphQL to represent free-form human-readable text.
ofType.name: String

ofType.name: Boolean

types.description: One possible value for a given Enum. Enum values are unique values, not a placeholder for a string or numeric value. However an Enum value is returned in a JSON response as a string.

ofType.description:
The fundamental unit of any GraphQL Schema is the type. There are many kinds of types in GraphQL as represented by the `__TypeKind` enum.

Depending on the kind of a type, certain fields describe information about that type. Scalar types provide no information beyond a name and description, while Enum types provide their values. Object and Interface types provide the fields they describe. Abstract types, Union and Interface, provide the Object types possible at runtime. List and NonNull types compose other types.
ofType.name: __Type

types.description: A GraphQL Schema defines the capabilities of a GraphQL server. It exposes all available types and directives on the server, as well as the entry points for query, mutation, and subscription operations.

fields.description: A list of all directives supported by this server.
fields.name: directives

ofType.name: __Directive

fields.description: If this server supports mutation, the type that mutation operations will be rooted at.

types.name: __Type

types.description: An enum describing what kind of type a given `__Type` is

enumValues.description: Indicates this type is an interface. `fields` and `possibleTypes` are valid fields.
enumValues.name: INTERFACE

enumValues.description: Indicates this type is a union. `possibleTypes` is a valid field.
enumValues.name: UNION

enumValues.description: Indicates this type is an enum. `enumValues` is a valid field.
enumValues.name: ENUM

enumValues.description: Indicates this type is an input object. `inputFields` is a valid field.
enumValues.name: INPUT_OBJECT

enumValues.description: Indicates this type is a list. `ofType` is a valid field.
enumValues.name: LIST

enumValues.description: Indicates this type is a non-null. `ofType` is a valid field.
enumValues.name: NON_NULL

enumValues.description: Indicates this type is a scalar.
enumValues.name: SCALAR

enumValues.description: Indicates this type is an object. `fields` and `interfaces` are valid fields.
enumValues.name: OBJECT

types.name: __TypeKind
